revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing the pages
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[ja:Category:飛鳥時代の建築]] [[commons:Category:Architecture of Asuka period]] [[ko:Category:아스카 시대의 건축]] [[zh:Category:飛鳥時代建築]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Daigokuden]].

[[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:History of Japanese architecture (by period)]] [[Category:飛鳥時代の文化]][[ja:Category:飛鳥時代の建築]] [[commons:Category:Architecture of Asuka period]] [[ko:Category:아스카 시대의 건축]] [[zh:Category:飛鳥時代建築]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]] [[Category:qq]]{{Commons category|Architecture of Asuka period}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:History_of_Japanese_architecture_(by_period)]]

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Pathnavbox| *{{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|建築|日本の建築|日本の建築史|日本の建築史 (時代別)}} *{{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|文化|日本の文化|日本の文化史|飛鳥時代の文化}} *{{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|歴史|日本の歴史|飛鳥時代|飛鳥時代の文化}} }} {{commonscat|Architecture of Asuka period}} [[飛鳥時代]]の[[日本建築]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{先代次代|[[日本建築史]]|'''Category:飛鳥時代の建築'''
592年-710年|[[:Category:古墳時代]]
592年以前
|[[:Category:奈良時代の建築]]
710年-794年}} ==関連カテゴリ== *[[:Category:日本の国宝 (建造物)]] *[[:Category:神社]] *[[:Category:日本の寺]] *[[:Category:飛鳥時代の遺跡]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:飛鳥時代の建築]]}} ==Old Content== (2025-05-16T00:58:24Z): (Bot: add category Category:飛鳥時代の文化) This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:藤原京]]. (2025-05-16T00:58:20Z): (Bot: add category Category:History of Japanese architecture (by period)) This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:藤原京]]. (2025-05-16T00:58:12Z): (Bot: update category metadata) This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:藤原京]]. (2025-05-15T01:33:44Z): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata) This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Daigokuden]]. {{Commons category|Architecture of Asuka period}} [[Category:Culture of the Asuka Period]] [[Category:History of Japanese architecture (by period)]] [[Category:History_of_Japanese_architecture_(by_period)]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Moved jawiki pages]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]] [[Category:qq]] [[commons:Category:Architecture of Asuka period]] [[ja:Category:飛鳥時代の建築]] [[ko:Category:아스카 시대의 건축]] [[zh:Category:飛鳥時代建築]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "): (Bot: add category" to "== "
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "==↵ Category:" to "== Category:"
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==関連カテゴリ==" to "==Related Categories=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q11296122)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q11296122)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
{{Pathnavbox| *{{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|建築|日本の建築|日本の建築史|日本の建築史 (時代別)}} *{{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|文化|日本の文化|日本の文化史|飛鳥時代の文化}} *{{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|歴史|日本の歴史|飛鳥時代|飛鳥時代の文化}} }} {{commonscat|Architecture of Asuka period}} {{先代次代|[[日本建築史]]|'''Category:飛鳥時代の建築'''
592年-710年|[[:Category:古墳時代]]
592年以前
|[[:Category:奈良時代の建築]]
710年-794年}} {{Commons category|Architecture of Asuka period}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:飛鳥時代の建築}} {{translated page|ja|Category:飛鳥時代の建築|version=85417265}} {{wikidata link|Q11296122}} [[co:commons:Category:Architecture of Asuka period]] [[ja:Category:飛鳥時代の建築]] [[ko:Category:아스카 시대의 건축]] [[zh:Category:飛鳥時代建築]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:藤原京]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Daigokuden]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Culture of the Asuka Period]] [[Category:History of Japanese architecture (by period)]] [[Category:History_of_Japanese_architecture_(by_period)]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]]

592年以前
|[[:Category:奈良時代の建築]]
710年-794年}} {{Commons category|Architecture of Asuka period}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:飛鳥時代の建築}} {{translated page|ja|Category:飛鳥時代の建築|version=85417265}} {{wikidata link|Q11296122}} [[co:commons:Category:Architecture of Asuka period]] [[ja:Category:飛鳥時代の建築]] [[ko:Category:아스카 시대의 건축]] [[zh:Category:飛鳥時代建築]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:藤原京]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Daigokuden]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Culture of the Asuka Period]] [[Category:History of Japanese architecture (by period)]] [[Category:History_of_Japanese_architecture_(by_period)]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]]
